description: Ion MIR shape-tracing regression - missing GC edge from Ion code to a JS Shape, detected by endVerifyPreBarriers. Bug 1804626 is a use-after-free class bug (csectype-uaf): the regressing Ion optimization in js/src/jit/CodeGenerator.cpp assumed shapes were always tenured and did not need to be traced through MIR operations. During eager JIT compilation, verifyprebarriers() exposed an unmarked edge from a JSObject to a Shape; debug builds assert in the GC barrier verifier, while non-debug builds can retain a dangling Shape reference after GC. The fix backs out the incorrect CodeGenerator.cpp optimization so Ion code keeps the required GC edge alive.
